title: Refresh docs and close out the slice
summary: Updates shared docs for bootstrap-mode copy-forward behavior, runs the validation gate, and closes the initiative with committed evidence.
scope_items: Document the distinction between bootstrap-mode discovery and steady-state authored hosted-pack registration.
Run targeted and broad validation, record the closeout result, and commit the completed change set.
done_when_items: Shared docs and standards reflect the new runtime behavior without misrepresenting the current internal plan steady state.
The initiative package is validated, closed, and committed.
